hints.text: Put together 3 of the same color to remove from the field
Wilcard quadz can be used in place of any color
Put together 4 quadz of the same color to make a wildcard
Put together 5 quadz of the same color to get a wildcard at the field edge
Wildcards can be part of different color groups at the same time
Bomb quadz kill everything around them. No wildcards are awarded and points are taken off, 1 per quad killed.
Make bombs by killing multiple color groups with one shot
Redirector cells change direction of quads moving through them
Color changers change color of quads flying over them (except wildcards and bombs)
Rock can only be killed with a bomb. It is not necessary to remove rocks. Preserved rocks earn extra points.
Hit bomb with a quad to detonate
Kill quadz with letters to spell level word before clearing the field
Until level word is complete, killing 4 quadz adds one of remaining letters to a random quad off the field instead of making a wildcard
Wildcard letter can be used in place of any other letter
Until level word is complete, killing 5 quadz adds wildcard letter to a random quad off the field
